assertions.description: Source has U3 (DRV8833PW), RSENSEA1 (0.2 ohm), RSENSEB1 (0.2 ohm), C2 (0.01uF), C6 (10uF) = 5 components. Output reports total_components=5, ic=1, resistor=2, capacitor=2. Hierarchical labels a_in1/a_in2/b_in1/b_in2/a_out1/a_out2/b_out1/b_out2/sleep_in/fault_out/motor_voltage all captured. The DRV8833PW has 16 pins (SLEEP on pin 1, VCP on pin 11, AISEN on pin 3, BISEN on pin 6, AIN1 on pin 16, AIN2 on pin 15, BIN1 on pin 9, BIN2 on pin 10, GND on pin 13, VINT on pin 14, VM on pin 12, FAULT on pin 8, AOUT1 on pin 2, AOUT2 on pin 4, BOUT1 on pin 7, BOUT2 on pin 5) — all captured correctly. Power rails GND and PWR_FLAG (from PCM_4ms_Power-symbol library) correctly detected.
